full_text:
Cao Mu 曹穆
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Mu (曹穆). Second son of Cao Rui. Prince of Fanyang. Died young. Cao Mu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Mu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
